programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Giving Thanks
programme.desc: The Pilgrims didn't get their turkey at the store and neither does Steven Rinella. On this special Holiday episode Steve cooks three enticing dishes: Wild Turkey Galantine, Smoked Black Bear Ham, and his take on the traditional Mincemeat Pie. Appetites will run large as Steve makes a special meal for his family and friends.

programme.title: MeatEater - True North: Alaska North Slope Caribou
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and special guest, the author Tim Ferriss, travel to the remote north slope of Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 1
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America, a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag, Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Greatest Draw: Alaska Dall Sheep Part 2
programme.desc: After drawing one of the most coveted big game tags in North America a Tok Management Area Dall sheep tag Steven Rinella heads out for a truly rare and epic Alaskan experience. Along with his brother Danny and friend Paul, Steve is dropped deep into the Alaska Range. After a rugged hike through nasty weather, Steve's skills and fortitude are tested against his elusive, high-climbing quarry.

programme.title: MeatEater - Sonoran Super-Birds: Mexico Gould's Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella crosses the border into Mexico's desert to call in the Gould's wild turkey. Of the five turkey subspecies in North America, the Gould's is the largest but rarest. On this unique Mexican adventure, Steve finds exciting action for gobbling toms. With locally made charcoal at his disposal, he'll grill up a big, brined, delicious bird.

programme.title: MeatEater - Straight Flush: Montana Mountain Grouse
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his friend Ronny Boehme drive into the mountains of southwest Montana to hunt the high ridge tops for dusky grouse. Ronny's Bracco Italiano hunting dogs have been bred and trained for this work, but can Ronny handle the altitude? The duo prepares dusky grouse jalape√±o poppers and grouse fettuccine with a white wine and cream sauce.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 1
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like they're on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but on this two-part episode Rinella grants his viewers an all-access pass to see just how the MeatEater crew works together to make the show. Strap-in for some behind-the-scenes action.

programme.title: MeatEater - Meet the Meateaters: Montana Crew Muley Part 2
programme.desc: The goal on MeatEater has always been to make viewers feel like theyre on a hunt with Steven Rinella, but.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - First Timers: Montana Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Television personality Joe Rogan and his best friend, comedian Bryan Callen, join Steven Rinella for their very first hunt. On a float trip for mule deer through the rugged Missouri Breaks, this is as adventurous of a first hunt as anyone could hope for, and Steve's special guests are in for a memorable experience and delicious wild game field cooking in some gorgeous country.

programme.title: MeatEater - Swamp Stew: Michigan Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to his cherished boyhood stomping grounds along Michigans Muskegon River.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Wide Open: New Mexico Antelope
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and friend Cody Lujan head to Northeastern New Mexico to hunt pronghorn antelope, the fastest big game animal in the United States. In the wide open desert plains, Steve will have to work hard to stalk within range of a mature buck. The payoff will be antelope loin topped with local New Mexico chiles.

programme.title: MeatEater - Florida Osceola Turkey
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. On this hunt, Steve and Janis Putelis are in Florida with local, Richard Martinez, in search for the illusive Osceola Turkey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bahamas Spearfishing
programme.desc: Hunter, author, cook and conservationist Steven Rinella treks into the world's most remote and beautiful regions, bringing game meat from field to table. Steve heads down to the Bahamas to spearfish with friends Kimi Werner and Cameron Kirkconnell. They explore the clear waters of the North Atlantic to bring home a wide array of fish species, including Mahi Mahi and grouper.

programme.title: Lousiana Spearfishing and Bowfishing
programme.desc: Steven Rinella returns to the coast of Louisiana to spearfish and bowfish with Ronnie Collins and Greg Fonts. With ideal conditions, Steve receives a last minute invitation from Ronnie to spearfish during the reintroduced spring Amberjack season. Afterwards, the crew stays up for a late evening of bowfishing for red drum.

programme.title: MeatEater - Into the Clouds: Sitka Blacktail Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella charters a float plane to drop off on a remote lake in Alaskas coastal rainforest for a solo.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Sweetest Meat: Alaskan Black Bear
programme.desc: As summer turns to fall, Steve heads into the backcountry of Alaska's Chugach Range.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Waters Edge: Waterfowl in Alaska
programme.desc: For a waterfowler's dream hunt, Steven Rinella joins his friend, wildlife biologist Brandt Meixell, on a remote trip to some untouched Alaska wetlands in search of ducks and geese. With a spread of decoys and a loyal retriever, they try to get their limit and fill their bellies with willow-spit roasted whole duck.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Rugged Peaks: Alaskan Mountain Goat
programme.desc: Every year, a handful of hunters draw a mountain goat permit to hunt the Mills Creek region of Alaskas Kenai.

programme.title: The Price of Winning
programme.desc: The 1987 Edmonton Oilers entered the Stanley Cup Finals as the greatest hockey team ever, boasting 7 future Hall of Famers and two Stanley Cups under their belt. The Philadelphia Flyers, on the other hand, entered the series with a rookie goalie as their only hope, playing like they had nothing to lose. What resulted from this matchup was one of the most iconic Game 7s in hockey history.

programme.title: The Euro Step
programme.desc: A generation of Europeans came to the NBA with skill and promise at the turn of the century, only to be thwarted by bigger, stronger competition stateside – that is, until Dirk Nowitzki took on the mighty Spurs in the 2006 playoffs.

programme.title: Next Year
programme.desc: It had been 108 years since the Chicago Cubs had last won the World Series. And now, after trailing 3-1 in the series, the Cubs were one game away from ending the drought. But against the Cleveland Indians – a franchise with their own long title drought – it would take everything the Cubs had and more to win Game 7 of the 2016 World Series.

programme.title: Capítulo 106
programme.desc: Due to jealousy, Roberta tells her mom to choose her or Mía. Miguel decides to tell Mía he has feelings for her; they decide to keep their relationship secret.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Six teenagers with different lives and personalities attend a prominent private school with only one thing in common: their vocation and passion for music.

programme.title: Capítulo 108
programme.desc: When Alma comes to Franco's house, she finds him drunk; he kisses her. Mia tells Giovanni the truth of how she feels and breaks up with him.

programme.title: Capítulo 109
programme.desc: Valeria warns Alma to stay away from Franco. After Mia and Miguel kiss, she runs away. However; she returns, apologizes, and ask him to make her a woman.

programme.title: Capítulo 110
programme.desc: Celina quits the band and asks Mia to take her place. Miguel takes Mia to her house to reconcile with her father.

programme.title: Capítulo 111
programme.desc: Teo tells Miguel he passed the test given by the Lodge members and it's all thanks to his girlfriend, Roberta. Franco tells Mia about her mom.

programme.title: Capítulo 112
programme.desc: Franco tells Miguel that Mia has been happier and more mature since she fell in love. Carlo, Mia's uncle comes to visit; him along with Franco, Valeria, Alma, Mia, and Miguel spend the weekend together.

programme.title: Capítulo 113
programme.desc: Paola tells Roberta everything that happened between León and her. Miguel apologizes to Mia for exploding on her about his father.

programme.title: Capítulo 114
programme.desc: Giovanni, Mia, Roberta, Diego, Miguel, and Mia have a successful show. Giovanni's mother embarrasses him in front of Tomas and his mother when they're invited to dinner.

programme.title: Capítulo 115
programme.desc: Miguel becomes upset when he learns that Mia invited his mother and sister to Cuernavaca. Giovanni's mother, Luisa, cries when she learns that he is ashamed of his family and lied about her not being his mother.

programme.title: Silvia party loving

programme.title: Nano por un día
programme.desc: La guardería está cerrada y Silvia y Luis no tienen quién cuide a Luisito Jr., por lo que tendrán que elegir entre los vecinos. Hipólito, Pedro y Germán buscan hacer válida la garantía de un celular.

programme.desc: A country music band from a small Mexican town, created by random bizarre members, strives to achieve fame and fortune.

programme.title: Se busca
programme.desc: El Chino consigue trabajo probando videojuegos y provoca que Albertano busque el empleo de sus sueños. María decide buscar novio por internet y, durante una de sus citas a ciegas, el chico la cambia por Betzabé.

programme.title: Celos a domicilio
programme.desc: María busca darle celos a Albertano y contrata a un hombre guapo por catálogo para hacerlo. Albertano muere de celos y le confiesa al Chino que la quiere, éste le aconseja que la vuelva a enamorar.

programme.title: El loco corte de pelo
programme.desc: Abrumada por sus inseguridades, Federica decide hacerse un arriesgado cambio de look. Sin embargo, antes de hacérselo lo consulta con Ludovico, quien no presta atención y le dice que sí lo haga. El resultado es que Federica se desgracia la cabellera justo el día que tiene una cena con excompañeros del colegio.

programme.title: El genio bursátil
programme.desc: Ludovico se mete en problemas en su trabajo cuando, por impertinente, trata de ayudar a Don Camerino en unos temas financieros. Tratando de solucionar el enredo, Ludovico complica todo aún más. Finalmente, y a punto de que ocurra un desastre financiero, Ludovico acude a la única persona que lo puede ayudar: Júnior.

programme.title: ¿Quién está en Barcelona?
programme.desc: A comedy series about a divorced dad who likes younger women, and his son who likes older women.

programme.title: Triangulo de amor
programme.desc: Aurelio deals with Ninon. Ninon turns down Tony and Monica. Scrapyard botches nabbing Esperanza but Zoe is killed. Ninon learns of Pilar's past drug habit. Both Aurelio and Ninon are irritated by Pilar's jealously.

programme.title: Ninon "se encarga" de su rival
programme.desc: Eunice notices Suta's affection toward BabyGirl. Raymundo talks to an old ally in Colombia also wanting to oust the Mexicans. Monica and Pastrana take notice of Felina's emerald interests in Europe and Colombia. Aurelio gets to know Ninon.

programme.title: La estampida de Esperanza
programme.desc: Ninon tells her son who his father was. Esperanza is on the run again. Jorge informs the Salvatierras of the truth. Carmen and her kids join the Casillases. Aurelio recognizes the uncanny resemblance of Leonardo to that of Chema Venegas.

programme.title: La frustracion de Monica
programme.desc: Carmen and Rutilla talk. Colon orders Jorge back to duty. Carla gets her interview. Isma and his advisor share an evening, as do the Salvatierras. Both Feline and Aurelio have strange phone calls.

programme.title: Casillas jura vengarse
programme.desc: Aurelio swears revenge to Esperanza. Felina searches for Pilar. Leonardo asks his Mom about the business. Super Javi brings Ruti all the money her Dad borrowed plus interest. Ninon and Pastrana both have eyes on Paris.

programme.title: Uzcategui, en terreno movedizo
programme.desc: Carla asks Ruti for an interview. Paloma has a check up. Dalvio has Roto follow Tata. Esperanza begs Monica for aid. Tony sets up an ambush at the gallery. Monica surprises Felina. Ninon delivers bad news to Aurelio, as does Roto to Dalvio.

programme.title: Una trampa para Aurelio
programme.desc: Raymundo coordinates with Leandro in Colombia. Aurelio smells an ambush. Felina exchanges harsh words to Monica, Monica in return to Tony. Isma brings a date to Ruti's dinner party. Felina and Aurelio go to France and identify Pilar corpse.

programme.title: Season 5
programme.desc: A humble man who wanted to become the most powerful man in the world of drug trafficking in Mexico.

programme.title: Morir antes que entregarse
programme.desc: Jaime poisons Paloma. Salazar and Colon are tracking movements along the shipping routes in Venezuela. Garcia is killed in the gun battle. Teran is suspicious of Castillo. Tony and Monica meet Ninon.

programme.title: Al pie de la letra
programme.desc: Rodrigo Rivero Lanz is executed by Dalvio. Paloma returns to Los Pinos. Juan Carlos searches for Casillas. Teran holds a press briefing setting Tony Pastrana responsible for Rivero and Garcia's deaths. Ninon wants to meet Aurelio.

programme.title: Traicion a la patria
programme.desc: Teran orders a search warrant on Carla Uzcategui. Monica is suspicious of Tony. Carmen plans Nazereno's funeral arrangements. Ruti is a saddened mess. BabyGirl and Suta draw close.

programme.title: Bienvenido doctor
programme.desc: El doctor Rafael Rivas se muda al edificio y Magdalena no deja pasar la oportunidad para conseguir una consulta gratis abusando de la confianza del nuevo inquilino.

programme.title: Una de terror
programme.desc: Silvita trata de mantener limpios los pasillos del edificio, ya que Lorena y Magdalena sacaron todas sus macetas. Mientras Luis trabaja, Pedro y Cris verán una película.

programme.title: Matrimonio perfecto
programme.desc: Silvita le demostrará a su vieja amiga Caro que tiene un matrimonio perfecto con Luis. Además, Lorena culpa a Germán por no tener limpio el patio del edificio.

programme.title: Roof Garden
programme.desc: Frankie abre un canal de videos para hablar sobre todo lo que sabe de cine. Mientras tanto, Magdalena quiere tener un departamento con un jardín en el techo.

programme.title: Megacorte de agua
programme.desc: La alcaldía anuncia un mega corte de agua y los vecinos acabarán con el suministro del edificio. Los López Pérez instalan un aire acondicionado en su departamento.

programme.title: Bloopers
programme.desc: Un capítulo especial con las equivocaciones de los vecinos más divertidas de la temporada. Descubre quién de los inquilinos comete más errores a la hora de grabar los episodios de la serie.

programme.title: Las palomas
programme.desc: A plague of pigeons arrives at the building and the neighbors fight them off with help from Germán. The López Pérez family runs out of coffee and Arturo must get it from the neighbors.

programme.title: Quédate en casa
programme.desc: The neighbors organize to fight the Coronavirus pandemic. The situation is complicated when someone steals the antibacterial gel from the entrance.

programme.title: El huerto de Vanesa
programme.desc: Vanesa puts a garden in the building, but discovers that someone is stealing her vegetables. Rocko has an intense toothache and doesn't want to go to the dentist.

programme.title: El colchón viejo
programme.desc: Magdalena sells her old mattress to Jorjais, unaware that Arturo keeps his savings there. Cris asks Pedro to formalize their relationship.

programme.title: Los quince años
programme.desc: It is Germán's 15th anniversary working in the building and is celebrated with a party. Frankie Rivers has a creative crisis.

programme.title: La gran fuga
programme.desc: There is a leak in one of the gas tanks and Germán is in charge of repairing it. Benito has a casting for the Rocky movie.

programme.title: Arturo sastre
programme.desc: Arturo takes out his old sewing machine to dedicate himself to sewing. Vanesa brings a rooster with Alzheimer's into the building that crows all day.

programme.title: El trabajo de Alejandra
programme.desc: The López Pérez need an extra income of money and Alejandra goes out to look for a job. Benito meets a friend from the castings and invites him to the apartment.

programme.title: La gotera
programme.desc: A leak in the López Pérez bathroom causes leaks in Pedro's apartment. Benito and Liz go to a casting for the musical Grease.

programme.title: Mi amiga Virginia
programme.desc: Virginia is left homeless and jobless. Germán decides to give her asylum and she becomes everyone's best friend. Luis signs up for Zumba classes online.

programme.title: Fiesta de casados
programme.desc: Luis feels lonely and Silvia encourages him to organize a meeting in the apartment. Luis invites the married men in the building. Vanesa entrusts Germán with a little bird with behavior problems.

programme.title: San Antonio
programme.desc: Germán and Jorjáis accidentally break Silvia's San Antonio statue. The López Pérez family complain about the high water consumption in the building.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.
